examples.sentence: I don't want to go to that meeting, last thing I need is more stress right now.
examples.translation: I don't want to go to that meeting, last thing I need is more stress right now.

examples.sentence: If it's the last thing I do, I'll make sure this project gets finished on time.
examples.translation: If it's the last thing I do, I'll make sure this project gets finished on time.

examples.sentence: She persisted with her training, determined to succeed if it was the last thing she did.
examples.translation: She persisted with her training, determined to succeed if it was the last thing she did.

examples.sentence: With the deadline looming, a computer crash was the last thing one needs.
examples.translation: With the deadline looming, a computer crash was the last thing one needs.

examples.sentence: After losing his job, getting sick was the last thing he needed.
examples.translation: After losing his job, getting sick was the last thing he needed.

examples.sentence: In the middle of exam season, having to deal with a noisy neighbor is the last thing one needs.
examples.translation: In the middle of exam season, having to deal with a noisy neighbor is the last thing one needs.

examples.sentence: When you're already overwhelmed, extra responsibilities are the last thing you need.
examples.translation: When you're already overwhelmed, extra responsibilities are the last thing you need.

examples.sentence: The congregation fell silent as the priest sounded the last trump, signaling the final judgment.
examples.translation: The congregation fell silent as the priest sounded the last trump, signaling the final judgment.

examples.sentence: According to the scripture, the last trump will announce the resurrection of the dead.
examples.translation: According to the scripture, the last trump will announce the resurrection of the dead.

examples.sentence: The chilling sound of the last trump echoed through the valley, marking the end of days.
examples.translation: The chilling sound of the last trump echoed through the valley, marking the end of days.

examples.sentence: Many believers await the moment the last trump is blown to witness the final reckoning.
examples.translation: Many believers await the moment the last trump is blown to witness the final reckoning.

examples.sentence: When the debate was tied, Maria played the last trump by revealing new evidence.
examples.translation: When the debate was tied, Maria played the last trump by revealing new evidence.

examples.sentence: He kept his last trump card hidden until the negotiation seemed hopeless.
examples.translation: He kept his last trump card hidden until the negotiation seemed hopeless.

examples.sentence: In the final moments of the game, their last trump was a risky but brilliant move.
examples.translation: In the final moments of the game, their last trump was a risky but brilliant move.

examples.sentence: The band ended the ceremony with the last trump, a powerful final note that resonated through the hall.
examples.translation: The band ended the ceremony with the last trump, a powerful final note that resonated through the hall.

examples.sentence: During the concert, the trumpeter nailed the last trump perfectly, bringing the audience to their feet.
examples.translation: During the concert, the trumpeter nailed the last trump perfectly, bringing the audience to their feet.

examples.sentence: The last trump sounded, signaling the conclusion of the royal procession.
examples.translation: The last trump sounded, signaling the conclusion of the royal procession.

examples.sentence: After hours of arguing, Lisa finally had the last word and ended the debate.
examples.translation: After hours of arguing, Lisa finally had the last word and ended the debate.

examples.sentence: John refused to let her have the last word in the conversation yesterday.
examples.translation: John refused to let her have the last word in the conversation yesterday.

examples.sentence: Will you please give me the last word so we can move on?
examples.translation: Will you please give me the last word so we can move on?

examples.sentence: The last word on the contract terms was decided by the legal team this morning.
examples.translation: The last word on the contract terms was decided by the legal team this morning.

examples.sentence: Her new smartphone is the last word in mobile technology, with cutting-edge features.
examples.translation: Her new smartphone is the last word in mobile technology, with cutting-edge features.

examples.sentence: They wanted their house to be the last word in modern design and luxury.
examples.translation: They wanted their house to be the last word in modern design and luxury.

examples.sentence: This fabric is the last word in waterproof materials used for outdoor gear.
examples.translation: This fabric is the last word in waterproof materials used for outdoor gear.

examples.sentence: No matter what she says, Tom always insists on having the last word during their arguments.
examples.translation: No matter what she says, Tom always insists on having the last word during their arguments.

examples.sentence: I won't let you have the last word this time; the decision is final.
examples.translation: I won't let you have the last word this time; the decision is final.

examples.sentence: He enjoys the debate but always tries to have the last word to assert his point.
examples.translation: He enjoys the debate but always tries to have the last word to assert his point.

examples.sentence: The monkey latched onto the branch tightly to avoid falling during the storm.
examples.translation: The monkey latched onto the branch tightly to avoid falling during the storm.

examples.sentence: You need to latch onto the railing when climbing the steep stairs for safety.
examples.translation: You need to latch onto the railing when climbing the steep stairs for safety.

examples.sentence: The child latched onto his mother's hand as they crossed the busy street.
examples.translation: The child latched onto his mother's hand as they crossed the busy street.

examples.sentence: During the boat ride, I latched onto the rope to keep from slipping.
examples.translation: During the boat ride, I latched onto the rope to keep from slipping.

examples.sentence: Whenever he feels lost, he tends to latch onto friends who can give him guidance.
examples.translation: Whenever he feels lost, he tends to latch onto friends who can give him guidance.

examples.sentence: She latched onto the new health craze, hoping it would improve her well-being.
examples.translation: She latched onto the new health craze, hoping it would improve her well-being.

examples.sentence: Many startups latch onto successful trends to gain quick popularity.
examples.translation: Many startups latch onto successful trends to gain quick popularity.
